ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and functionality */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the model belongs to */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary tool used to create the model */,
  "fmu_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model supports FMU export/import */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is accessible to all users or restricted */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last test conducted on the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_models_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES software_tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the software tool (e.g., CATIA, Dymola) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software tool */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software (e.g., CAD, Simulation) */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key for the software tool */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the software was last updated */,
  "supported_os" TEXT /* Operating systems supported by the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model being used */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software tool used for the model */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was used */,
  "num_executions" INTEGER /* Number of times the model was executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the model */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Average execution time of the model */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES software_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the firm */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the version (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model associated with this metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata attribute */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version associated with this metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata value (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metadata_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metadata_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test passed (true/false) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or comments about the test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution time of the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Mechanical, Electrical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what models fall under this category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id")
)
